playbook.intent: Fixed corpus + frozen test queries → decide which chunking + retrieval combo wins this week and ship the winner behind a flag.
playbook.scope: On a fixed corpus + frozen test queries, decide which chunking + retrieval combo wins this week and ship the winner behind a flag. Champion-challenger discipline.

stage.name: Setup
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when inputs are frozen.

stage.name: Chunk Variants
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each variant indexed cleanly.

stage.name: Retrieve & Rerank
stage.intent: Hybrid retrieval + rerank for each variant.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each variant produces comparable traces.

stage.name: Score
stage.intent: Eval each variant on retrieval + generation metrics.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one variant clearly wins or is tied.

stage.name: Ship Winner
stage.intent: Promote winner behind feature flag with rollback.
stage.decision-gate: Ship only after rollback is exercised.

extra.value: [Building the eval set itself — see playbook 1, Multi-tenant corpus design]
[Frozen test set with judge rubrics, Indexable corpus snapshot]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content rag-chunking-strategy-bench --format md, agent: faion get-content rag-chunking-strategy-bench --format context, json: faion get-content rag-chunking-strategy-bench --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
